backstory.original: A glamorous diva possessed by a Deva, with an inciting voice and gleaming pristine robes, Orisha is the lead vocalist of the Sirens of the Realms, her found family. She is of such great renown, that she needs no last name.
backstory.display: 奥瑞莎是被天人附身的迷人女歌手。她拥有绝佳的嗓音和发光的纯洁长袍，是“海妖国度”的首席主唱。她的名气大到甚至都不需要姓氏。

description.original: Orisha summons rays of fire and hurls them at multiple random targets.
description.display: 奥瑞莎召唤火焰射线并将其投向多个随机目标。

longDescription.original: Orisha summons rays of fire and hurls them at multiple random targets.
longDescription.display: 奥瑞莎召唤火焰射线并将其投向多个随机目标。

description.original: Orisha eyes light aglow and two angel wings burst from her back. A wave of divine energy surges across the screen damaging all enemies.
description.display: 奥瑞莎的眼睛射出光芒，身后生出一对天使之翼。神圣能量从屏幕上喷涌而过，对所有敌人造成伤害。

longDescription.original: Orisha eyes light aglow and two angel wings burst from her back. A wave of divine energy surges across the screen damaging all enemies.
longDescription.display: 奥瑞莎的眼睛射出光芒，身后生出一对天使之翼。神圣能量从屏幕上喷涌而过，对所有敌人造成伤害。

description.pre: Whenever Orisha uses Radiant Soul, her angel wings burst aflame and Flaming Wings gains $(orisha_max_stacks) stacks. Stacks decay by 1 per second. The damage of Scorching Ray is increased by $(orisha_flaming_buff_base_amount)% plus $(orisha_flaming_buff_stack_amount)% (additive) for every stack remaining. At 0 stacks, her wings and damage bonus are removed. Whenever Orisha gets a kill, the stacks reset to $(orisha_max_stacks), but the decay rate is increased by $(decay_amount)% (multiplicative).

每当奥瑞莎使用光耀之魂时，她的天使之翼就会燃烧起来，燃烧翅膀获得 $(orisha_max_stacks) 层堆叠。堆叠每秒减少 1 层。每剩余一层，灼热射线的伤害就会提升 $(orisha_flaming_buff_base_amount)% 加 $(orisha_flaming_buff_stack_amount)%（加算）。到达 0 层时，她的翅膀和伤害加成会移除。每当奥瑞莎被击杀时，堆叠会重置为 $(orisha_max_stacks)，但衰减率会增加 $(decay_amount)%（乘算）。

tipText.original: When Orisha uses her ultimate her Wings burst aflame, increasing damage, kills further increase damage but make the wings burn out more quickly.
tipText.display: 奥瑞莎使用杀招时，她的翅膀会燃烧起来，使伤害提高。击杀可以进一步提高伤害，但会使翅膀更快熄火。

description.desc: The effect of Flaming Wings is increased by $(amount)%.
燃烧翅膀技能的效果提升 $(amount)%

specializationDescription.original: Orisha focuses on the power of her Flaming Wings.
specializationDescription.display: 奥瑞莎专注于她提高燃烧翅膀的力量。

description.desc: Flaming Wings starts with $(amount)% more stacks.
燃烧翅膀初始多获得 $(amount)% 堆叠层数

specializationDescription.original: Orisha focuses on keeping her Flaming Wings ablaze.
specializationDescription.display: 奥瑞莎专注于维持燃烧翅膀的火焰。

tipText.original: Orisha has a strong connection with Vlahnya, they strongly buff each others abilities.
tipText.display: 奥瑞莎与弗拉希娜关系紧密，互相使对方的技能大幅强化。

description.desc: The effect of Bardic Connection is increased by $(amount)%.
诗歌纽带技能的效果提升 $(amount)%

specializationDescription.original: Orisha increases her contribution to Bardic Connection.
specializationDescription.display: 奥瑞莎提高她对诗歌纽带的贡献。

description.desc: Orisha's damage is increased by $(amount)% for each Champion affected by Bardic Connection (stacking multiplicatively). Vlahnya's Enthralling Performance buff always applies to Orisha, and Orisha counts as adjacent to her for the Bass portion.
每有一位被诗歌纽带技能所影响的勇士，奥瑞莎的伤害提升 $(amount)%（以乘算方式堆叠）。弗拉希娜的醉人表演增益始终对奥里夏生效，并且奥里夏始终被算作与弗拉希娜相邻，以获得醉人表演：贝斯技能的加成

specializationDescription.original: Orisha increases her bond with Vlahnya.
specializationDescription.display: 奥瑞莎强化她与弗拉希娜的联系。

description.desc: Whenever there is a boss monster on the screen, Orisha's Flaming Wings and Bardic Connection abilities are increased by $(amount)%.
屏幕中有一名首领怪物时，奥瑞莎的燃烧翅膀和诗歌纽带技能效果提升 $(amount)%

description.original: Don't get in my way.
description.display: 不要挡我的路。

description.original: You want to end up like the half-orc nursing his sore head in the corner?
description.display: 你是想跟角落里那位鼻青脸肿的半兽人一样的下场吗？

description.original: Let's go.
description.display: 出发吧。

description.original: Get behind me and close your eyes!
description.display: 快躲到我身后闭上双眼！

description.original: I was made for this.
description.display: 我就是为这一刻而生的。

description.original: Yes, they are both.
description.display: 是的，它们两者皆是。

description.original: Vlahnya always has our backs. Except for when she doesn't.
description.display: 弗拉希娜一直都很靠得住。除非是在她不靠谱的时候。

description.original: Just hold the tempo and we'll be celebrating soon!
description.display: 保持着这种节奏，胜利就在眼前了！

description.original: This is it! Let's hit 'em with all we've got!
description.display: 就看这一刻了！全力爆发吧！

description.original: Didn't see that one coming, did you?
description.display: 你万万也没想到吧？

description.original: We find ourselves in disarray, that stupid hollyphant always leaves us this way!
description.display: 我们团队落得人仰马翻，都怪圣飞象丢下我们不管！

description.original: It gets the job done.
description.display: 能用就行。

description.original: Here, hold my staff. Let me juggle for you!
description.display: 来，帮我拿着我的手杖。我来给你表演个杂技！

description.original: For when we really need to hit the harmonies!
description.display: 为我们实在需要敲和声时准备的！

description.original: You'll regret the day the Sirens turned their eyes on you.
description.display: 有朝一日你会后悔海妖们把目光投向了你。

description.original: The less familiar I am, today, the better.
description.display: 今天我看起来越陌生越好。

description.original: Come on, we need to fit in here!
description.display: 拜托，我们得融入这里啊！

description.original: Looking good is its own revenge.
description.display: 好看本身就是一种复仇。

description.original: Wait, did it happen again?
description.display: 等等，又来了吗？

description.original: Oh this? It's my workout gear.
description.display: 噢，这件吗？这是我的健身服啦。

description.original: Come watch the sunset with me.
description.display: 过来和我一起看日落吧。

description.original: Vlahnya has another heist for us. Best look my best.
description.display: 弗拉希娜有另一起劫案让我们去干。我最好拿出最好的表现来。

description.original: Watch me roll.
description.display: 看我的！

description.original: I'm with the band.
description.display: 我是跟乐队一起的。

description.original: Let me sing you a song...
description.display: 让我给你唱首歌吧......

description.original: We recovered it when we were repairing the Yawning Portal. Don't tell Durnan.
description.display: 这是我们在维修裂隙传送门时找回的。可别告诉杜尔南。

description.original: You mess with one of our bandmates, you mess with all of us.
description.display: 你惹了我们一个乐队成员，就是惹了我们所有人。

description.original: I'd rather go without.
description.display: 我宁愿不要。

description.original: My dad said that it makes me invincible. Why tempt fate?
description.display: 我爸说这会让我无敌。为什么要冒险呢？

description.original: Gotta look my best for our show!
description.display: 为了我们的演出，我要打扮打扮，让自己看起来最美！

description.original: I'll distract them, you grab the mark!
description.display: 我引开他们的注意，你去拿那个标志！

description.original: Let's do this, Sirens!
description.display: 我们来吧，海妖们！

description.original: Ghost was a cat at the time..?
description.display: 那时候的幽魂是猫......？

description.original: They loved the show, just not the fight that broke out after.
description.display: 他们还挺喜欢那演出的，就是不喜欢之后爆发的那场打斗。

description.original: All proceeds go to Durnan to pay for portal repair.
description.display: 所有收益都给了杜尔南用来支付哈欠大门的维修费用。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Aasimar Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a DEX score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Neutral Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: A glamorous diva possessed by a Deva, with an inciting voice and gleaming pristine robes, Orisha is the lead vocalist of the Sirens of the Realms, her found family. She is of such great renown, that she needs no last name.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Orisha's ultimate initiates a buff to her normal attack, each kill she gets increases the buff while also increasing the speed at which the buffs expires. She also has a special connection with Vlahnya, each is better together than apart.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 奥瑞莎是被天人附身的迷人女歌手。她拥有绝佳的嗓音和发光的纯洁长袍，是“海妖国度”的首席主唱。她的名气大到甚至都不需要姓氏。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 奥瑞莎的杀招为她的普通攻击提供一个增益效果，每次击杀都会增强该增益，同时也会提高该增益失效的速度。她与弗拉希娜也有特殊联系，这两人在一起的效果会比分开更好。

original.name: Scorching Ray
original.description: Orisha summons rays of fire and hurls them at multiple random targets.
original.long_description: Orisha summons rays of fire and hurls them at multiple random targets.

display.name: 灼热射线
display.description: 奥瑞莎召唤火焰射线并将其投向多个随机目标。
display.long_description: 奥瑞莎召唤火焰射线并将其投向多个随机目标。

original.long_description: Orisha eyes light aglow and two angel wings burst from her back. A wave of divine energy surges across the screen damaging all enemies.

display.long_description: 奥瑞莎的眼睛射出光芒，身后生出一对天使之翼。神圣能量从屏幕上喷涌而过，对所有敌人造成伤害。

original.tip_text: Orisha has a strong connection with Vlahnya, they strongly buff each others abilities.

display.name: 诗歌纽带

original.name: Worn Staff

display.name: 用旧的手杖
display.description: 能用就行。

original.name: Icebreaker Staff

display.name: 破冰者手杖

original.name: Borrowed Cloak

display.name: 借来的斗篷

original.name: Cloak of Many Fashions

display.name: 很时尚的斗篷
display.description: 好看本身就是一种复仇。

original.name: Deva's Regalia
original.description: Wait, did it happen again?

display.name: 天人的标志

original.name: Morning Robe

display.name: 晨袍
display.description: 噢，这件吗？这是我的健身服啦。

original.name: Evening Shawl

display.name: 晚装披巾
display.description: 过来和我一起看日落吧。

original.name: Robe of Resilience
original.description: Vlahnya has another heist for us. Best look my best.

display.name: 坚韧长袍
display.description: 弗拉希娜有另一起劫案让我们去干。我最好拿出最好的表现来。

original.name: Dazzling Armor of the Diva
original.description: Watch me roll.

display.name: 歌姬耀眼的盔甲
display.description: 看我的！

original.name: Road Gear
original.description: I'm with the band.

display.name: 户外用品
display.description: 我是跟乐队一起的。

original.name: Charming Shield
original.description: Let me sing you a song...

display.name: 吸引人的盾牌
display.description: 让我给你唱首歌吧......

original.name: Ancient Armor
original.description: We recovered it when we were repairing the Yawning Portal. Don't tell Durnan.

display.name: 远古盔甲
display.description: 这是我们在维修裂隙传送门时找回的。可别告诉杜尔南。

original.name: Radiant Shield
original.description: You mess with one of our bandmates, you mess with all of us.

display.name: 光芒四射的盾牌
display.description: 你惹了我们一个乐队成员，就是惹了我们所有人。

original.name: Costume Jewelry
original.description: I'd rather go without.

display.name: 人造珠宝
display.description: 我宁愿不要。

original.name: Child's Creation
original.description: My dad said that it makes me invincible. Why tempt fate?

display.name: 孩子的作品
display.description: 我爸说这会让我无敌。为什么要冒险呢？

original.name: Concert Wear
original.description: Gotta look my best for our show!

display.name: 音乐会穿的衣服
display.description: 为了我们的演出，我要打扮打扮，让自己看起来最美！

original.name: Diva Crown

display.name: 歌姬头冠
display.description: 我引开他们的注意，你去拿那个标志！

original.name: Weathered Sheet

display.name: 风化的薄片

display.name: 错过了的节目传单
display.description: 那时候的幽魂是猫......？

display.name: 演出评价
display.description: 他们还挺喜欢那演出的，就是不喜欢之后爆发的那场打斗。
